notes: Game works perfectly like on native windows, including fullscreen and windowed mode. The key mappings were different to what the store page stated: F10 changes volume, F11 changes screen modes (not sure if it is because of Proton, different keyboard layouts or if the information on the store page was not correct).
title: Tcheco in the Castle of Lucio

notes: Funciona perfeitamente gostei muito belo trabalho da valve em criar o steam play
